application_type: Production-oriented FastAPI backend for an AI-assisted restaurant ordering system.

architecture_style.summary: Layered FastAPI application with routers, services, repositories, SQLAlchemy models, Pydantic schemas, Redis-backed chat sessions, and WebSocket notifications.
architecture_style.entrypoint: app/main.py configures logging, startup checks, FastAPI lifespan, CORS, health check, and /api/v1 router mounting.
layers: API routers in app/api/routers and app/api/websockets

service_organization.product_service: Thin wrapper around product repository operations.
service_organization.order_service: Creates orders from chat sessions and maps orders to DTOs.
service_organization.chat_service: Loads Redis chat session, calls Gemini parser, dispatches state machine, and saves session.
service_organization.gemini_service: Builds prompt with current state and menu, calls Gemini generateContent, validates structured JSON.
service_organization.dashboard_service: Transforms aggregate repository rows into dashboard response objects.
service_organization.product_resolver_service: Maps LLM product names to database Product rows using partial name matching.

repository_data_access.pattern: Synchronous SQLAlchemy Session passed from FastAPI dependency into repositories.
repository_data_access.transaction_style: Most simple writes commit in repositories; chat order creation coordinates order and item inserts in order_service before a single commit.

schema_organization.observations: Schemas are organized by feature but have limited validation constraints for email, password, money, stock, and quantities.

websocket_architecture.authentication: JWT token is expected in websocket query params and validated with validate_token.
websocket_architecture.connection_manager: In-memory list of active WebSocket objects in app/core/websocket_manager.py.
websocket_architecture.broadcast_flow: Order checkout publishes an event to Redis; app lifespan listener receives it and broadcasts JSON to active WebSocket connections.

authentication_architecture.token_payload: sub and email, exp hardcoded to 8 hours.
authentication_architecture.dependency: get_current_user validates JWT and loads User by email.

redis_usage.chat_session_store: Stores ChatSessionSchema JSON per session_id with TTL.
redis_usage.order_events: Publishes order_created events to the orders channel.
redis_usage.listener: Background lifespan task polls Redis pub/sub and broadcasts events to websockets.

external_integrations.name: PostgreSQL
external_integrations.usage: Primary relational database via SQLAlchemy and psycopg2.

external_integrations.name: Redis
external_integrations.usage: Chat sessions and real-time order event pub/sub.

external_integrations.name: Google Gemini API
external_integrations.usage: Natural-language chat intent and structured order extraction.

startup_lifecycle.import_time: setup_logging and run_startup_checks execute before FastAPI app starts.

deployment_architecture.docker: Dockerfile uses python:3.12-slim, installs requirements, copies app, and runs uvicorn on ${PORT:-10000}.
deployment_architecture.development_compose: docker-compose.dev.yml runs API with reload and a Redis service.
deployment_architecture.render: No explicit render.yaml found; Dockerfile dynamic PORT support is compatible with Render-like platforms.
